headline: Venture Global Gains From Strong LNG Demand and Contract Visibility

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.

headline: Not all oil stocks will benefit from Middle East conflict, JPMorgan says

headline: Oil Surges Past $110 as Trump Threatens ‘Hell’ for Iran — Which Energy Stocks Could Catch the Rally?
summary: Crude oil prices have surged past $110 a barrel amid rising tensions in the Middle East. Over the weekend, President Donald Trump warned that etfs">Iran it could face attacks on bridges and power plants if the vital Strait of Hormuz is not reopened. As a result, Brent crude (CM:BZ) hovered just around $110, while West Texas Intermediate (WTI) (CM:CL) neared $112.
